TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Eddie_Biedenbach, title = Eddie_Biedenbach, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Eddie_Biedenbach} }

S.FORM: Eddie Biedenbach sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1945, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 8, Eddie Biedenbach, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Eddie Biedenbach sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1945, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 8, Eddie Biedenbach, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: e**ie βie*enβaʦ~ʨħ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, e**ie βie*enβaʦ~ʨħ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
